title: Phase 14A — Autonomous Growth Operating System Build Report

deliverables: Full inventory of 29 crons, 16 QFINHUB skills, 50+ scripts, 50+ tracker files
15-subagent team architecture with clear missions and handoff points
QFINHUB Quality Auditor with 5 review categories and scoring rubrics
10 new skill definitions + 9 existing skills reused
Dry run completed — Auditor correctly holding actions in cooldown
Zero content published, zero changes made during build
